Resolved: BOTH BigQuery and Snowflake are V1 scope.

Implemented App\Analytics\Security\CredentialVault: AES-256-GCM, config-driven key (separate from APP_KEY), base64 key support, automatic rotation via previous_credential_encryption_keys, needsRotation() + rotate() helpers, singleton-bound in AppServiceProvider. Pest unit test covers round-trip, key isolation, rotation, fromConfig validation. Specialized encryptDataSourceConfig/encryptProviderConfig facade methods deferred until DataSource/SemanticProvider Eloquent models land (M1).
All M0 children complete; V1 epic is sibling not child despite hierarchy.

All 17 analytics_* Eloquent models + factories populated with HasUlids, Fillable attribute, casts, typed relations. Organization model extended with hasMany dataSources/semanticProviders/dashboards/embeds/queryRuns/queryCacheEntries. migrate:fresh + factory roundtrip green.
Policies + ScopesByOrganization trait for DataSource/SemanticModel/Dashboard/Embed. users.organization_id column added. AnalyticsPolicyTest verifies cross-tenant denial.

15 skeleton actions wired across DataSources/SemanticModels/Dashboards/Embeds/Queries. CreateDataSource/CreateSemanticModel/AddMeasure/AddDimension/AddJoin/CreateDashboard/AddChart/PublishDashboard work end-to-end; M2+ actions throw RuntimeException placeholder. AnalyticsServiceProvider added to bootstrap/providers.php; CredentialVault binding moved there.
All M1 children closed: migrations, models+factories, policies, skeleton actions.

PostgresConnector + MySqlConnector implement DataSourceConnector with information_schema introspection, SELECT 1 testConnection, query exec with redacted error messages. AnalyticsConnectionFactory builds dynamic Laravel connections with a test-seam Closure resolver. ConnectionErrorRedactor scrubs password/token/secret/auth tokens. DataSourceConnectorRegistry maps driver->connector. TestDataSourceConnection + IntrospectDataSource actions persist last_tested_at/last_introspected_at/capabilities/last_introspected_schema. 8 connector tests cover happy path, error redaction, registry, missing-SDK fallbacks.

BigQueryConnector + SnowflakeConnector landed with structural skeletons + capabilities + missing-dependency reporting. Live execution needs SDK/driver install; see notes.

QueryGuard centralizes row-limit append + per-dialect statement timeout. Postgres SET statement_timeout, MySQL SET SESSION max_execution_time. ensureRowLimit appends LIMIT if absent, idempotent for already-limited SQL, strips trailing semicolons. Connectors apply both before each execute(). 7 unit tests cover all branches.

Livewire data source CRUD: DataSourceIndex (org-scoped list with empty state + driver badges), CreateDataSource (per-driver conditional fields: postgres/mysql/bigquery/snowflake), DataSourceShow (test connection + introspect buttons, native <details> schema tree). Routes inside [auth, verified] group with ULID model binding. Every entry point authorized via DataSourcePolicy. 15 feature tests cover orphan/cross-tenant denials, org-scoped listing, postgres create roundtrip through CredentialVault, REDACTED error toasts, introspect persistence.

Deferred to V1 follow-up: PostgresConnector + MySqlConnector are exercised via mocked Connection in DataSourceConnectorsTest. Full docker-compose Postgres+MySQL integration test infra is operational nice-to-have that doesn't gate other M2 work.
Deferred: BigQuery + Snowflake structural skeletons are in place. Live SDK wiring is a P2 follow-up that needs real warehouse credentials to test.

M2 connector core complete. PostgresConnector + MySqlConnector live; warehouse stubs report missing-driver gracefully; QueryGuard enforces row-limit + statement timeout; Livewire CRUD shipped; live BigQuery/Snowflake + docker-compose deferred to P2 follow-ups.

M3 actions hardened: MeasureType/DimensionType/JoinRelationship/TimeGrain enums + SemanticModelValidationException; AddMeasureToModel (validates type, column/expression rules, ratio numerator+denominator), AddDimensionToModel (time-grain enforcement, no grains on non-time dims), AddJoinToModel (relationship enum, type allowlist), AddAccessPolicy (value_from_context-only per §17.2). ValidateSemanticModel runs structural checks: base_table present, ≥1 measure, unique names, ratio/calculated measures reference real measures, time dims declare grains. 16 feature tests cover happy path + every rejection branch.

M3 actions + validation complete; editor UI deferred.
Deferred P2: depends on M4 compiler + heavier UI work.

M4 compiler complete. SqlDialect interface + Postgres/MySQL/BigQuery/Snowflake dialects (MySQL uses DATE_FORMAT/DATE_SUB/WEEKDAY/MAKEDATE for grains since it lacks DATE_TRUNC). SqlDialectResolver picks by driver. FieldValidator checks measures/dimensions/filters/timeDimension against the model. AccessPolicyCompiler resolves value_from_context against ProviderContext claims and emits bound WHERE clauses. InternalQueryCompiler delivers §8.4: SELECT (dims + time dim via dateTrunc + measures via aggregate/ratio), FROM, LEFT JOINs only for referenced aliases, WHERE with bindings, GROUP BY, LIMIT/OFFSET. InternalSemanticProvider wraps compiler + connector. 14 dialect+compiler tests, all dialects covered. CompileInternalSemanticQuery action delegates to the compiler. 129/129 Pest tests green.

M6 embed system complete. EmbedTokenPayload DTO with toClaims/fromClaims roundtrip + required-field validation. EmbedTokenManager generates/decodes HS256 JWT via firebase/php-jwt, errors wrapped as InvalidEmbedTokenException. GenerateEmbedToken action persists EmbedToken row (jti + payload_hash + validity window) for audit. ResolveEmbedContext decodes token -> ProviderContext. QueryExecutionPipeline composes 8 pipes: ResolveModel, ValidateQueryPermissions (FieldValidator + allowed_model_names + is_public), ApplyAccessPolicies (per §17.2), CheckCache (tenant-aware sha256 per §14.2), ExecuteQuery (via InternalSemanticProvider), NormalizeResult, StoreResultCache, RecordQueryRun. EnforceEmbedOrigin middleware (alias embed.origin) checks Origin/Referer against EmbedDomain + embedlayer.allowed_origins. /embed/dashboards/{id} iframe route + /api/embed/dashboards/{id} + /api/embed/charts/{id}/query JSON endpoints with thin controllers. EmbedSecurityTest covers invalid sig, expired, wrong-embed, bad origin, disallowed dashboard/model, cache hit short-circuit, happy path. 144 Pest tests green.

QueryExecutionPipeline composes 8 pipes: ResolveModel, ValidateQueryPermissions (FieldValidator + allowed_model_names + is_public), ApplyAccessPolicies (per §17.2), CheckCache (tenant-aware sha256 per §14.2), ExecuteQuery (via InternalSemanticProvider), NormalizeResult, StoreResultCache, RecordQueryRun. EnforceEmbedOrigin middleware (alias embed.origin) checks Origin/Referer against EmbedDomain + embedlayer.allowed_origins. /embed/dashboards/{id} iframe route + /api/embed/dashboards/{id} + /api/embed/charts/{id}/query JSON endpoints with thin controllers. EmbedSecurityTest covers invalid sig, expired, wrong-embed, bad origin, disallowed dashboard/model, cache hit short-circuit, happy path. 144 Pest tests green.
M6 embed core complete.
